description_long: This is a large, stately bungalow set within a walled estate featuring manicured gardens, symmetrical pathways, and decorative landscaping. The main building is a multi-story structure with a prominent, dark hip roof and a brick facade accented by white trim and columns. The front entrance is grand, with a wide staircase leading up to a covered porch supported by columns, and the building is flanked by tall, evenly spaced trees and ornamental shrubs. The estate grounds include paved walkways, fountains, gazebos, and several garden beds, all enclosed by a white perimeter fence with decorative gates. The rear and side gardens are lush, with circular and rectangular planting beds, benches, and pergolas, providing a sense of luxury and order. The overall design is formal and symmetrical, evoking a sense of grandeur and exclusivity.
description: A grand, multi-story bungalow with a hip roof, brick facade, and extensive landscaped gardens enclosed by a white fence. The estate features formal pathways, fountains, and decorative garden structures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide staircase, covered porch, and symmetrical landscaping leading up to the building.
description_view_1: Side perspective highlighting the length of the estate, garden pathways, and additional garden structures along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the formal garden layout, central fountain, and the back facade of the bungalow with visible windows and landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the estate's depth, side gardens, and the arrangement of trees and pathways along the boundary.
